case_title: SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. et al VS. JULIA GARRARD

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY APPELLANT SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. AS JOINT EMPLOYER ST. JOHN, EL AN INDIVIDUAL, AS JOINT EMPLOYER AS TO RESPONDENT GARRARD, JULIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-03-2002 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JUL-01-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN 206
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO RESPONDENT GARRARD, JULIA
ORDER GRTG PLTFFS' MOTION TO DISMISS DEFTS' APPEAL OF THE ORDERS, DECISIONS, OR AWARDS OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRARD, JULIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. AS JOINT EMPLOYER ST. JOHN, EL AN INDIVIDUAL, AS JOINT EMPLOYER $14,372.41 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,372.41, SEE SCANNED DOC PLUS COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTYS FEES NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-01-2002 VACATED, MOTION TO DISMISS APPEAL GRANTED, JUDGMENT ENTERED.

ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE FOR ALL PURPOSES UNDER LEAD CASE NUMBER 405393 WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS INCLUDED IN INSTANT MOTION: 404034, 404035, 404040/404039, 404047/404045, 404264, 404265, 404274, 404275, 404276, 404290, 404304; AND WITH THE FOLLOWING CASE NUMBERS NOT SUBJECT TO INSTANT MOTION: 405393, 405396, 405407, 405413, 405402, 405399, 405398, 405410, 404271; ALL CASES CONSOLIDATED UNDER #405393 PER NOTICED MOTION AND PER COURT'S OWN MOTION UNDER CCP 1048, SO STIPULATED BY COUNSEL. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. IN ADDITION, MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO 05/07/02 UNDER #405393. DEFT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL SUPPORTING PAPERS RE INDIGENCE BY 04/25; RESPONSE DUE 05/01. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER. REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS ATTORNEY FOR GARRARD, JULIA
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL (LABOR APPEAL) FILED
NOTICE OF REPRESENTATION OF RESPONDENT FILED BY LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
